summary: Tested Chantier 2 — Import CSV wizard. Fixed critical App.js duplicate function declarations (ProtectedRoute + AppRoutes defined twice, blocking compilation). After fix, all 14 test cases passed including full 4-step import wizard flow, role-based menu visibility, and counters.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js had duplicate ProtectedRoute and AppRoutes function declarations (lines 16-52 vs 49-79). The second copy was the old version without the import route — caused compilation failure. Fixed by removing the duplicate block.
seed_data_creation: Created 'Projet CSV Test' project via CSV import during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chantier 2 (Import CSV) fully validated. Bug fixed: App.js had duplicate ProtectedRoute+AppRoutes causing compilation failure — removed duplicate block. All import wizard steps work: upload, mapping (auto-mapped 9/9), validation, commit (1 created, 0 ignored), nouvel import reset. Role-based access correct: READ_ONLY has no nav-import, PMO and ADMIN both have it.

test_results.entity_buttons: PASS - entity-btn-projects, tasks, resources all present
test_results.file_upload_analyse: PASS - file uploaded, Analyser clicked, API 200
test_results.validate_mapping: PASS - validation step shown after btn-valider
test_results.commit_import: PASS - result step shown after btn-importer
test_results.counters_visible: PASS - Créés(1), Ignorés(0), Total traité(1) all shown
